videoSnippet.title: My Spidey-sense is Tingling
videoSnippet.description:
Rubinstein Immortal Game old https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=QKD2UZq9USs
Rubinstein Immortal Game new https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=OQB74BbvXQw
Have a great day :)

Photos by Lenart Ootes (usually)

Max Euwe vs Akiba Rubinstein
The Hague (1921), The Hague NED, rd 5, Oct-31
Sicilian Defense: Nimzowitsch. Advance Variation (B29)

1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 Nf6 3. e5 Nd5 4. d4 cd4 5. Qd4 e6 6. c4 Nc6 7. Qd1 Nde7 8. Bd2 Ng6 9. Qe2 Qc7 10. Bc3 b6 11. h4 d6 12. ed6 Bd6 13. Nbd2 Nf4 14. Qe3 Bc5 15. Qe4 f5 16. Qc2 O-O 17. g3 Ng6 18. h5 Nge5 19. Ne5 Ne5 20. b4 Bf2 21. Kf2 Ng4 22. Ke2 Qg3 23. Bd4 Bb7 24. Rh3 Qd6 25. Qc3 e5 26. Bg1 f4 27. c5 Qh6 28. Ke1 e4 29. Rh4 Qg5 30. Qh3 Ne3 31. Be3 fe3 32. Bc4 Kh8 33. Nf1 Qf6
